special_mechanics.name: Column Falling
special_mechanics.description: Columns of three different symbols fall from top of well. Player can move left/right and cycle symbol positions within column while falling.

special_mechanics.name: Gravity Settlement
special_mechanics.description: After column lands, pile settles under gravity. If matches occur, symbols disappear and remaining jewels resettle, potentially creating chain reactions.

special_mechanics.name: Magic Jewel
special_mechanics.description: Special multicolor jewel that destroys all jewels matching the color of the jewel directly beneath it.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Columns is a puzzle game with minimal character physics. Movement mechanics are column-based rather than character-based. No jump physics, gravity constant, or sub-pixel systems documented. Sources provide gameplay description but no technical physics parameters.
